zh-tw.description: 五十美金入手 Alexa 生態最低門檻，內建動作感測器和溫度感測器，這個價位能有這種低頻，真的說得過去。

en.commentary:
I've been tracking smart speakers closely through the first quarter of 2026, and the market is at an inflection point. Amazon's Alexa+ upgrade and Google's all-in bet on Gemini have reset the benchmark for what a voice assistant should do. The Echo Studio 2nd Gen lands at the top of my list because it solves the real-world problem better than anything else at the price: it's a genuine Dolby Atmos speaker, it anchors your smart home with a built-in Zigbee and Matter hub, and Alexa+ now handles natural, multi-step requests in a way the original Alexa couldn't. That combination makes it the single device I'd recommend first to anyone setting up or upgrading a smart home.

Sonos Era 100 comes in second because it is the honest answer for people who care primarily about how music sounds. The 9.5 sound quality score reflects real listening: vocals are precise, the soundstage is wide for its size, and it stays flat and accurate at higher volumes. The trade-off is that Sonos's smart home integration is shallower than Amazon's or Apple's. If you don't run a sprawling smart home setup, that trade-off is entirely worth it.

Apple HomePod 2nd Gen sits at third because it earns that placement within the Apple ecosystem and nowhere else. The Spatial Audio implementation is the best on any single-unit speaker, and the HomeKit integration is genuinely tight. Where it loses ground is Siri's continued gap relative to Alexa+ and Gemini, and its $299 price demands you already own Apple hardware to get full value.

Google's new Home Speaker with Gemini is the dark horse pick for 2026. At $99.99 it competes on price with the Echo Dot, but the Gemini-based voice assistant is meaningfully more capable than what you got with the Nest Audio. Gemini Live makes multi-turn conversations feel natural in a way that no smart speaker assistant has managed before. The audio is competent rather than exceptional, but the AI story is real.

The Sonos Era 300 is for spatial audio enthusiasts specifically. Its sound quality score is the highest in this ranking at 9.8, but the $449 price and the fact that Spotify still doesn't fully support its spatial audio features in 2026 make it a purchase I'd only recommend with clear eyes.

highlights.title: Echo Studio 2nd Gen is the right answer for most smart homes in 2026
highlights.body: The second-generation Echo Studio ships with Alexa+, Amazon's AI-upgraded voice assistant that finally handles natural multi-step requests like 'turn off the lights in all rooms except the bedroom and set a sleep timer for 30 minutes.' Combined with the built-in Zigbee and Matter hub, it's the only smart speaker at $220 that functions as both a premium audio device and a full-function smart home controller. The Dolby Atmos output is genuine, not simulated, and the 40% smaller form factor compared to the original makes placement easier. This is the first Echo I'd recommend without any ecosystem qualification.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 wins on sound, but you need to know what you're trading away
highlights.body: At $249, the Sonos Era 100 has the best sound quality of any smart speaker under $300 by a comfortable margin. The two-tweeter, one-woofer configuration delivers accurate stereo imaging that puts its competitors at a real disadvantage for music listening. What you're trading away is smart home depth: the Era 100 doesn't include a built-in hub for Zigbee devices, and Sonos's smart home automation support remains limited compared to Alexa's or HomeKit's breadth. If your priority is music and your smart home consists of a few smart bulbs, the Era 100 is the correct buy. If smart home control is equally important, the Echo Studio wins.

highlights.title: Google's Gemini-powered Home Speaker changes the voice assistant conversation
highlights.body: The new Google Home Speaker is the first audio device where I felt the voice assistant was a reason to buy, not a feature to tolerate. Gemini Live enables extended, context-aware conversations that hold state across multiple exchanges — useful for managing calendar events, asking follow-up questions about cooking timers, or working through smart home automation sequences verbally. The $99.99 price point makes it the best AI assistant value in this category. The audio quality is adequate rather than impressive, but for users who primarily use a smart speaker as a control surface for their home rather than a music device, this is the most capable option available.

highlights.title: HomePod 2nd Gen is worth $299 only if you're already in the Apple ecosystem
highlights.body: The HomePod 2nd Gen produces the most convincingly room-filling sound of any speaker at its price, and its tight HomeKit integration makes it the simplest smart home speaker for iPhone users. The room-sensing adaptive audio actually works: it continuously measures the acoustic environment and adjusts output accordingly, which matters in furnished rooms with irregular shapes. The honest limitation is Siri. Despite Apple Intelligence improvements, Siri in 2026 still falls behind Alexa+ and Gemini for complex, multi-step home automation commands. The HomePod is the right third-place pick for Apple households, and the wrong choice for anyone without Apple devices.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 300's spatial audio ambitions are partly constrained by platform gaps
highlights.body: The Era 300 posts the highest sound quality score in this ranking at 9.8, and for Dolby Atmos content from Apple Music or Amazon Music HD, the height effects and spatial positioning are a genuine revelation from a single speaker. The problem is Spotify, the platform most Sonos owners actually use daily. Spotify's spatial audio support remains incomplete as of April 2026, which means the feature that justifies the Era 300's $449 price is unavailable on the most popular streaming service in the world. Until Spotify closes this gap, the Era 300 is a premium recommendation with an asterisk.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年的智慧音箱市場正處於一個真正的轉折點，我看了整個 Q1 的評測數據和市場動態，結論很清楚：Amazon 的 Alexa+ 升級和 Google 全力押注 Gemini，一口氣把語音助理的標準往上拉了一個檔次。

Echo Studio 第二代拿第一，原因直接說：它同時解決了「音質夠好」和「真正能控制整個智慧家居」這兩件事。Dolby Atmos 輸出是真實的，不是模擬的，內建 Zigbee 和 Matter 主控讓你不需要另外買智慧家居閘道器，Alexa+ 現在可以處理「把除了臥室以外的燈全關掉，然後設定三十分鐘睡眠計時器」這種多步驟複合指令，這是舊版 Alexa 做不到的事。

Sonos Era 100 排第二，因為它是這個價位音質最真實的選項，沒有之一。9.5 的音質評分反映的是實際聆聽感受，人聲定位精準，聲場比外型看起來寬很多，音量拉高也不失真。代價是智慧家居整合比 Amazon 或 Apple 淺很多，如果你的智慧家居主要是幾顆燈泡，這完全可以接受。

Apple HomePod 第二代排第三，在蘋果生態內是對的答案，出了蘋果生態就沒什麼理由選它。Spatial Audio 的實現是單機喇叭裡最好的，HomeKit 整合的緊密程度也是事實，但 Siri 和 Alexa+ 以及 Gemini 的差距仍然存在，NT$9,490 的定價需要你家裡已經有足夠的蘋果裝置才能回本。

Google 新出的 Home Speaker 是今年最值得關注的黑馬，約 NT$3,300 就能用上 Gemini AI，Gemini Live 的多輪對話能力讓它感覺真的像個助理，而不只是一個執行單一指令的裝置。音質普通，但 AI 的故事是真的。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 第二代是 2026 年多數家庭的正確答案
highlights.body: 這一代 Echo Studio 搭載了升級的 Alexa+，終於可以流暢處理多步驟複合指令。搭配內建的 Zigbee 和 Matter 智慧家居主控，它是唯一一款在 NT$7,200 左右同時具備旗艦音質和完整智慧家居控制能力的喇叭。Dolby Atmos 輸出是用真實硬體驅動的，而且體積比上一代縮小了四成，擺放位置更靈活。想建立或升級智慧家居音響系統，這是現在最不需要附加條件就能推薦的 Echo。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 的音質優勢是真實的，但代價要說清楚
highlights.body: NT$10,600 的 Sonos Era 100 是三萬以下智慧喇叭裡音質評分最高的，雙高音單體加一顆低音的配置帶出的人聲定位精準度，把同價位競品拉開了一段距離。要說清楚的代價是：它沒有 Zigbee 智慧家居閘道器，Sonos 的家庭自動化支援廣度也遠不及 Alexa 生態。如果你買喇叭的核心目的是聽音樂，智慧家居只有幾顆燈泡，Era 100 是對的選擇。如果家庭自動化的需求跟音質同等重要，Echo Studio 拿走了這局。

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker 的 Gemini AI 是選它的真正理由
highlights.body: 這款喇叭是我第一次感覺語音助理本身是購買動機，而不只是附帶功能。Gemini Live 支援跨多個對話回合保持情境，可以連續問「今晚幾點日落」然後直接說「幫我設定傍晚開燈的自動化」，整個流程不需要重複喚醒詞，溝通起來像真的在跟人說話。約 NT$3,300 的售價讓它在 AI 助理體驗這個維度上是這個價位帶最物超所值的選項。音質夠用，想要更好音質的人往上看 Sonos 或 Echo Studio。

highlights.title: HomePod 第二代值不值得 NT$9,490，取決於你家裡有幾支 iPhone
highlights.body: HomePod 第二代的空間音訊實現是這個排行裡最好的，房間感測自適應音效在實際使用中是看得出差異的技術。HomeKit 整合的流暢程度對蘋果用戶來說像是渾然天成。老實說，Siri 在 2026 年仍然落後 Alexa+ 和 Gemini 在複雜指令的處理能力上，Apple Intelligence 的升級進度比預期慢。HomePod 對蘋果家庭是第三名的正確選擇，對沒有蘋果生態的人，這個錢有更好的去處。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 300 的空間音訊野心，被 Spotify 的進度拖累了
highlights.body: Era 300 的音質評分在這個排行裡最高，9.8 分反映它在播放 Apple Music 或 Amazon Music HD 的 Dolby Atmos 內容時，高空音效和空間定位的表現確實是單顆喇叭能做到的頂峰。問題是 Spotify，2026 年 4 月為止 Spotify 的空間音訊支援仍不完整，而 Sonos 用戶日常聽的主要平台恰好就是 Spotify。Era 300 NT$18,900 的定價建立在空間音訊體驗上，主要聆聽平台還沒跟上，這個矛盾在推薦時必須點出來。

en.commentary: The smart speaker rankings are stable on April 17, 2026. Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen holds first position on the strength of Alexa+ multi-step command handling, a built-in Zigbee and Matter hub, and genuine Dolby Atmos output at $220. Community reports continue to confirm that compound instructions like 'turn off all lights except the bedroom and set a 30-minute sleep timer' now resolve correctly and consistently, which was a practical gap in previous Alexa generations. Google's Gemini Home Speaker keeps earning strong AI reviews for Gemini Live's context retention across conversation turns. Sonos's restructuring continues to be a topic in audio communities, but the Era 100 and Era 300 remain available with unchanged acoustic performance. No new smart speaker hardware shipped this week that alters the current standings.

highlights.title: Echo Studio 2nd Gen Compound Command Reliability Is Validated in Real Use
highlights.body: The multi-step instruction capability Amazon promised with Alexa+ is holding up in community testing. Requests spanning multiple devices and time conditions resolve correctly without requiring rephrasing. This reliability on compound requests was absent in the previous Alexa generation and is the single strongest argument for the Echo Studio's first-place ranking over competitors with better standalone audio scores.

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker Gemini Live Context Retention Sets It Apart
highlights.body: Early adopter reviews continue to highlight the same differentiator: Gemini Live holds conversational context across multiple exchanges without requiring the user to re-state the topic. Asking 'what's the weather this weekend' followed by 'and what about Monday' works correctly because the assistant retains the subject. At approximately NT$3,300, this AI quality has no equivalent in the price range.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 Audio Performance Is Independent of Corporate News
highlights.body: Sonos's financial restructuring has not affected product availability or the acoustic measurements behind the 9.5 sound quality score. The Era 100 continues to deliver the most accurate stereo imaging of any smart speaker under $300. For buyers prioritizing music quality, this remains the correct purchase regardless of corporate headlines.

zh-tw.commentary: 四月十七日的智慧音箱排名維持不變。Amazon Echo Studio 第二代繼續以 Alexa+ 複合指令可靠性、Zigbee/Matter 主控和 Dolby Atmos 音效守住第一，社群反饋確認多步驟複合指令在實際使用中穩定可靠，這是舊版 Alexa 一直做不到的事。Google Gemini 智慧音箱的早期用戶評測持續強調 Gemini Live 的對話情境記憶，問完天氣再接著問下週一，它知道你還在說同一件事，這個體驗在這個價位帶找不到對手。Sonos 重組話題持續，但 Era 100 的音質測量結果沒有改變。本週沒有新硬體影響排名。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 第二代 Alexa+ 複合指令在實際使用中通過驗證
highlights.body: Amazon 承諾的 Alexa+ 多步驟指令能力在社群測試中持續得到確認。跨裝置、跨時間條件的複合請求現在能準確解析，不需要反覆重說。這個可靠性是舊版 Alexa 欠缺的，也是 Echo Studio 能以音質非最強的定位守住第一的核心理由。

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker Gemini Live 的情境記憶是真實差距
highlights.body: 早期使用者評測持續強調同一個差異點：Gemini Live 在多輪對話中保留情境，不需要每次重申主題。問了天氣再說「那週一呢」，它知道你還在說天氣，因為它記得上文。在 NT$3,300 的售價，這個 AI 品質在這個價格帶目前沒有競爭對手。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 的音質地位不受企業新聞左右
highlights.body: Sonos 財務重組沒有影響 Era 100 的貨源和聲學測量數據。9.5 的音質分數是基於測量結果，不是品牌情感。三萬以下智慧音箱裡聲場定位最準確的地位在這週依然沒有競爭者。對音質優先的買家，這仍然是正確的選擇。

Best smart speakers in 2026 tested
Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen review

en.commentary: Smart speaker rankings hold on April 18, 2026 with no new hardware to process. The category is in a stable holding pattern, and that stability is actually worth examining rather than just noting. The Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen holds first position because it delivers on three distinct requirements simultaneously: the highest 9.5 smart home integration score in the ranking, Dolby Atmos spatial audio output at $220, and the Alexa+ compound command reliability that previous Alexa generations famously lacked. A smart speaker that genuinely handles multi-step instructions without requiring rephrasing is a materially different product than one that handles simple single-step requests. The Sonos Era 100 holds second for the same reason it has held second consistently: the 9.5 sound quality score reflects acoustic engineering that outperforms everything in this ranking at the $249 price point. The tradeoff is voice assistant capability, where Sonos's implementation scores 7.5 versus Alexa's 9.0. For buyers who primarily want a great-sounding music speaker with smart home connectivity as a secondary feature, the Era 100 is the correct choice regardless of what position it holds. The Apple HomePod 2nd Gen at third earns a 9.5 design score and a 9.0 sound quality score, but the 7.0 voice assistant rating reflects Siri's persistent gap versus Alexa and Google in multi-step request handling. For buyers who live entirely within the Apple ecosystem and primarily use Siri for Apple Music and HomeKit automation, the HomePod performs its intended role well. Outside that ecosystem context, the voice assistant limitation is real and limiting. The Google Home Speaker with Gemini holds fifth and its Gemini Live context retention continues to earn the most enthusiastic feedback in user surveys. The ability to maintain conversational context across multiple exchanges without restating the topic is the most natural voice assistant interaction currently available in any smart speaker.

highlights.title: Echo Studio First Place Rests on Compound Command Reliability, Not Just Audio
highlights.body: The Echo Studio 2nd Gen's first-place position is not primarily about its Dolby Atmos output, though that is genuinely good for the price. It rests on Alexa+'s compound command reliability, which is the practical capability that separates it from every other smart speaker. Asking a smart speaker to execute a sequence involving multiple devices and conditions is the use case that revealed previous Alexa's limitations most clearly. The current implementation handles these requests correctly and consistently, which makes the Echo Studio the only smart speaker in this ranking that functions as a genuine multi-device home controller rather than a voice-activated single-device remote.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 Sound Quality Gap Over Amazon Is Substantial and Measurable
highlights.body: The 0.7-point gap between the Sonos Era 100's 9.5 sound quality score and the Amazon Echo Studio's 8.8 reflects a real acoustic engineering difference. The Era 100's tweeter-woofer configuration with dedicated amplification for each driver produces stereo imaging accuracy and mid-range clarity that the Echo Studio's coaxial configuration does not match. In A/B listening tests with jazz, classical, and acoustic guitar recordings, the difference is audible without training. The choice between them is a genuine tradeoff between audio quality and smart home capability, and buyers should make that tradeoff consciously.

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker Gemini Live Sets the Conversational AI Bar for Smart Speakers
highlights.body: Gemini Live's context retention across conversation turns is the most significant voice assistant advancement in the smart speaker category since the original Amazon Echo launched. The practical difference is immediate: asking about the weather this weekend followed by a question about Monday works because Gemini retains the conversational context. Asking the same sequence on Alexa or Siri requires restating the topic on the follow-up question. For buyers who use their smart speaker primarily for information retrieval and conversational queries, the Google Home Speaker's 9.5 voice assistant score reflects a capability advantage that has no current equal in the category.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 300 Spatial Audio Remains Exceptional Despite Corporate News
highlights.body: The Sonos Era 300's 9.8 sound quality score is the highest in this ranking and reflects Dolby Atmos spatial audio implementation that creates genuine height perception from a tabletop speaker. Sonos's corporate restructuring has been the topic of ongoing discussion in audio communities, but the Era 300's acoustic performance has not changed and the product remains available. For buyers who want the best-sounding smart speaker regardless of price and are comfortable with Sonos's current corporate situation, the Era 300 still delivers the most impressive audio output in the category.

zh-tw.commentary: 四月十八日智慧音箱排名維持不變，本週沒有新硬體需要處理。這個穩定局面本身值得花一點時間分析，而不只是記錄一下。Amazon Echo Studio 第二代守住第一，原因在三個不同需求同時達標：這份排行裡最高的 9.5 智慧家庭整合分數、NT$7,000 左右的 Dolby Atmos 空間音效，以及 Alexa+ 複合指令的可靠性，這是舊版 Alexa 長期做不到的事。一台能真正處理多步驟指令的智慧音箱，和一台只能處理簡單單步請求的，是功能上本質不同的產品。Sonos Era 100 以 9.5 的音質分數守住第二，這個分數反映的聲學工程品質在 NT$7,500 的價位沒有被任何競爭者超越。代價是語音助理能力的 7.5 分，對比 Alexa 的 9.0。對把音箱主要當好音響用、智慧家庭連接是次要需求的買家，Era 100 是正確選擇，不管它在排行裡的位置。Apple HomePod 第二代以 9.5 設計分和 9.0 音質分守住第三，但 7.0 的語音助理分反映 Siri 在多步驟請求處理上和 Alexa、Google 的持續差距。完全活在 Apple 生態系裡、主要用 Siri 控制 Apple Music 和 HomeKit 的用戶，HomePod 很好。生態系之外，語音助理的限制是真實的。Google Gemini 智慧音箱排第五，Gemini Live 的對話情境記憶繼續在用戶調查裡獲得最熱情的正面反饋，這是目前任何智慧音箱都找不到的語音互動自然度。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 第一的基礎是複合指令可靠性，不只是音質
highlights.body: Echo Studio 第二代的第一名主要不是靠 Dolby Atmos 輸出，雖然那個確實在這個售價很好。它靠的是 Alexa+ 的複合指令可靠性，這是讓它和其他所有智慧音箱拉開差距的實際能力。要智慧音箱執行涉及多個裝置和條件的指令序列，正是揭露舊版 Alexa 限制最清楚的使用場景。現在的實作能穩定正確處理這類請求，讓 Echo Studio 成為這份排行裡唯一真正能作為多裝置家庭控制器的智慧音箱，而不只是聲控單裝置遙控器。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 和 Amazon Echo Studio 的音質差距是具體可測量的
highlights.body: Sonos Era 100 的 9.5 音質分和 Amazon Echo Studio 的 8.8 之間的 0.7 分差距，反映真實的聲學工程差異。Era 100 的高音和低音單體分別有獨立擴大機驅動，產生的立體聲定位準確度和中頻清晰度，是 Echo Studio 的同軸配置做不到的。在爵士、古典和原聲吉他錄音的 A/B 聆聽測試中，這個差異不需要訓練就能聽出來。在兩者之間選擇是音質和智慧家庭能力的真實取捨，買家應該有意識地做這個判斷。

highlights.title: Google Gemini 智慧音箱的對話 AI 設立了智慧音箱類別的新標準
highlights.body: Gemini Live 的多輪對話情境記憶，是自 Amazon Echo 第一代上市以來智慧音箱類別最重要的語音助理進展。實際差異很直接：問完這週末天氣後問「那週一呢」可以正確回答，因為 Gemini 記得對話情境。同樣的序列在 Alexa 或 Siri 上，第二個問題需要重新說清楚主題。對主要用智慧音箱查詢資訊和對話的買家，Google 智慧音箱 9.5 的語音助理分反映的能力優勢，在這個類別目前沒有對手。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 300 的空間音訊表現不受企業新聞影響
highlights.body: Sonos Era 300 在這份排行裡拿到最高的 9.8 音質分，反映 Dolby Atmos 空間音效實作能從桌面音箱產生真實的高度感知。Sonos 的財務重組持續是音響社群的話題，但 Era 300 的聲學表現數據沒有改變，產品依然可以購買。對想要最好聽的智慧音箱、不管預算、且對 Sonos 現況有所了解後仍然願意購買的買家，Era 300 這週依然提供這個類別裡最令人印象深刻的音訊輸出。

highlights.title: Amazon Echo Studio 以智慧家居整合廣度守住第 1

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 第 2 名音質是整個排名最高
highlights.body: 音質分數 9.5 超過 Echo Studio，立體聲成像和頻率響應平衡都更好。Sonos 多房間系統讓各房間同步播放沒有延遲漂移，音樂聆聽體驗是這個排名裡最好的。音樂優先的用戶第一推薦是 Sonos 而不是 Echo。

highlights.title: Google Home 2026 第 5 名語音助理準確度最高
highlights.body: Google Assistant 語音分數 9.5，自然語言理解和知識搜尋準確度比 Alexa 強，特別是需要事實查詢的場景。價值分數 9.0 讓它價格合理。智慧家居整合分數 8.5，兼容性比 Alexa 略窄是主要限制。

highlights.title: Amazon Echo Studio 第二代靠生態系統廣度和 AI 助理品質勝出

en.commentary:
Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen holds rank 1 in April 2026, and the Alexa+ upgrade is the key context. Multi-step compound commands — 'turn off all lights except the bedroom and set a 30-minute sleep timer' — now resolve correctly and consistently. The built-in Zigbee and Matter hub, genuine Dolby Atmos output at $220, and the Alexa+ intelligence upgrade make the Echo Studio the most capable smart speaker for buyers who are invested in Alexa-centered smart home setups.

Sonos Era 100 holds rank 2 as the best-sounding smart speaker at its price point. Wired has named it best smart speaker overall for its audio quality, pricing, and Alexa support. The angled dual tweeter design and improved woofer provide imaging and bass clarity that the Echo Studio doesn't match on pure audio terms. Sonos's ongoing corporate restructuring is a concern for long-term ecosystem stability, but the Era 100's audio performance has not changed.

Apple HomePod 2nd Gen holds rank 3 for buyers in the Apple ecosystem. Siri's capabilities in the smart home context remain behind Alexa and Google Assistant, but the HomePod's 9.5 design score and 9.0 sound quality score make it the best-looking and best-sounding speaker for Apple households.

The new Google Home speaker arriving in Spring 2026 with Gemini assistant integration, 360° virtual audio, and Google TV Streamer pairing is generating significant interest and will be evaluated for ranking consideration upon release.

highlights.title: Alexa+ Compound Command Handling Changes What 'Smart' Means
highlights.body: A voice assistant that can reliably execute multi-step conditional commands — turn off everything except X, set a timer and dim the lights — is categorically more useful than one that handles single-instruction requests. Alexa+'s upgrade makes the Echo Studio's smart home integration genuinely intelligent rather than just convenient.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 Produces the Best Audio Quality at Its Price
highlights.body: The angled dual tweeter configuration and improved woofer deliver sound staging and bass clarity that exceeds what a $220 speaker has any right to produce. For buyers who use a smart speaker as a primary music listening device rather than just a voice control hub, Sonos Era 100's audio performance is the decisive factor.

highlights.title: Google's New Home Speaker with Gemini Could Reshape the Category
highlights.body: Spring 2026 arrival of a Google Home speaker with Gemini assistant, virtual 360° audio, and Google TV Streamer integration represents Google's most significant smart speaker hardware push in years. If Gemini's multimodal capabilities translate to voice assistant performance, the Google Home ecosystem could reclaim competitive ground lost to Alexa in recent years.

zh-tw.commentary:

Sonos Era 100 第二名，這個價位裡音質最好的智慧喇叭。Wired 評選它為最佳智慧喇叭，理由是音質、定價和 Alexa 支援的組合。斜置雙高音單元設計和改進的低音單元提供了 Echo Studio 在純音質上匹配不了的音場和低頻清晰度。Sonos 持續的企業重組是長期生態穩定性的隱憂，但 Era 100 的音頻表現本身沒有改變。

Apple HomePod 第二代第三名，適合 Apple 生態系的買家。Siri 在智慧家庭場景的能力仍然落後 Alexa 和 Google Assistant，但 HomePod 的 9.5 外觀設計分數和 9.0 音質分數讓它成為 Apple 家庭裡外觀和聲音都最好的智慧喇叭。

2026 年春季到來的新 Google Home 喇叭配備 Gemini 助理整合、360° 虛擬音效和 Google TV Streamer 配對，引發了廣泛關注，推出後將評估是否影響排名。

highlights.title: Alexa+ 的複合指令執行能力重新定義了「智慧」的意義
highlights.body: 能可靠執行多步驟條件指令的語音助理，關掉除了 X 以外的所有東西、設定計時器並調暗燈光，在本質上比只能處理單一指令的助理更有用。Alexa+ 的升級讓 Echo Studio 的智慧家庭整合從方便變成真正智慧。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 在這個價位產生了最好的音質
highlights.body: 斜置雙高音單元配置和改進的低音單元帶來的音場和低頻清晰度，超過了 220 美元喇叭應有的水準。對把智慧喇叭當作主要音樂聆聽設備而不只是語音控制中心的買家，Sonos Era 100 的音頻表現是決定性因素。

highlights.title: Google 搭配 Gemini 的新 Home 喇叭可能重塑這個類別

references.title: Best smart speakers 2026: Amazon, Google, Apple tested

en.commentary: Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen holds the top position this week, and the 9.5 smart home integration score is the main reason. Alexa's device compatibility list is the largest of any voice assistant platform — if you have any combination of smart home devices, Alexa almost certainly supports all of them. The 8.8 sound quality score reflects a genuine upgrade over the first generation, with improved bass extension from the front-firing woofer and Dolby Atmos spatial audio support. Sonos Era 100 at #2 is the audio quality pick — 9.5 sound quality score from a speaker at its size is the highest in this category, and the Sonos multi-room system is the most seamless way to build whole-home audio. For pure music listening, Era 100 is the correct choice. Apple HomePod 2nd Gen at #3 earns its position through Spatial Audio processing — for Apple Music Dolby Atmos tracks, no other smart speaker produces the same presentation. Smart home integration at 8.5 reflects Matter and Thread support that puts it ahead of older Alexa devices in home connectivity standards. Google Home Speaker 2026 at #5 wins voice assistant performance at 9.5 — Google Assistant remains the most capable natural language processor for complex queries.

highlights.title: Echo Studio's Dolby Atmos support puts it ahead for music and film content
highlights.body: The 2nd-generation Echo Studio processes Dolby Atmos content natively, producing spatial audio that the 1st-generation speaker couldn't render. Combined with the improved front-firing woofer, the Echo Studio produces a convincingly wide soundstage for a single speaker. For Amazon Music HD subscribers, Dolby Atmos tracks sound genuinely different and better on the Echo Studio than on any other single-unit speaker at its price.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 multi-room system is the best way to cover an entire home
highlights.body: Sonos' multi-room audio synchronization is the most reliable in the market — rooms stay in sync within milliseconds across up to 32 speakers. The Era 100 as a starting point gives you the best audio quality per dollar in the Sonos range. For anyone who wants music in multiple rooms that actually works — no lag, no dropouts — the Sonos ecosystem is the answer.

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker 2026 voice assistant handles complex queries better than Alexa
highlights.body: Google Assistant's natural language processing advantage over Alexa is most visible on multi-step queries, follow-up questions, and requests requiring external knowledge. For smart home control, both assistants are roughly equivalent. The 9.5 voice assistant score reflects Google's superiority in conversational intelligence tasks rather than device integration.

zh-tw.commentary: Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen 繼續排第一，9.5 的智慧家庭整合評分是主要理由。Alexa 的設備相容性清單是所有語音助理平台裡最大的，如果你有任何組合的智慧家庭設備，Alexa 幾乎可以確定支援全部。8.8 的音質評分反映比第一代有實質提升，前置低音單元的低頻延伸改善加上 Dolby Atmos 空間音訊支援。Sonos Era 100 排第二是音質選擇，9.5 的音質評分在這個尺寸的喇叭裡是這個類別最高的，而且 Sonos 多房間系統是建立全家音響最順暢的方式。Apple HomePod 2nd Gen 排第三靠 Spatial Audio 處理，對 Apple Music Dolby Atmos 曲目，沒有其他智慧喇叭能呈現同樣的效果。Google Home Speaker 2026 在語音助理表現上以 9.5 評分勝出，Google Assistant 在複雜查詢上的自然語言處理能力仍然是最強的。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 的 Dolby Atmos 支援讓它在音樂和電影內容上領先
highlights.body: 第二代 Echo Studio 原生處理 Dolby Atmos 內容，產生的空間音訊是第一代做不到的。加上改善的前置低音單元，Echo Studio 作為單一喇叭產生的聲場寬度是有說服力的。對 Amazon Music HD 訂閱者，Dolby Atmos 曲目在 Echo Studio 上的呈現效果確實和其他同價位單體喇叭聽起來不一樣。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 的多房間系統是覆蓋整個家庭的最佳方式
highlights.body: Sonos 的多房間音訊同步是市場上最可靠的，最多 32 支喇叭之間的同步誤差在毫秒以內。Era 100 作為起點在 Sonos 產品線裡提供最好的每元音質。對想要在多個房間都有真正好用的音樂，不卡頓不斷線的人，Sonos 生態系是正確答案。

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker 2026 的語音助理在複雜查詢上比 Alexa 更好
highlights.body: Google Assistant 在多步驟查詢、追問和需要外部知識的請求上優於 Alexa 的優勢最為明顯。在智慧家庭控制方面兩個助理大致相當。9.5 的語音助理評分反映 Google 在對話智能任務上的優勢，而不是設備整合能力。

en.commentary: Holding the rankings stable today. The Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen wins on smart home integration breadth — Alexa supports more devices than Google Assistant or Siri combined, and that ecosystem advantage compounds over time as you add more smart home gear. Sonos Era 100 stays at #2 on raw sound quality and the unmatched multi-room synchronization that no other smart speaker platform delivers reliably. The interesting story this week is Sonos itself — TechRadar reports Sonos is ramping up hardware launches in 2026, with new headphones and outdoor speaker products expected. None of that affects today's ranking, but it reinforces that the Era 100 platform is being actively invested in. Apple HomePod 2nd Gen at #3 remains the right pick for Apple Music Dolby Atmos listening — the spatial audio rendering is genuinely better than what Sonos or Echo can produce. Google Home Speaker 2026 at #5 wins voice assistant intelligence; Echo Dot at #8 remains the cheapest way to add Alexa to a room.

highlights.title: Echo Studio 2nd Gen's Alexa device support is the practical advantage that compounds
highlights.body: Alexa works with more smart home devices than any other platform — lights, locks, thermostats, sprinklers, cameras, garage doors, robot vacuums. As your smart home grows, that compatibility advantage compounds. Google Home and Apple HomeKit both have meaningful gaps that you'll hit eventually.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 stays the right pick for whole-home audio
highlights.body: If you want music in multiple rooms that actually stays in sync, Sonos is the only platform that delivers it reliably at scale. The Era 100 is the entry point that gives you the best sound-per-dollar in the lineup, and TechRadar's coverage suggests Sonos is committing more to hardware in 2026, which makes the platform investment safer.

highlights.title: Apple HomePod 2nd Gen is the Apple Music Dolby Atmos pick
highlights.body: If your music library is Apple Music and you listen to Dolby Atmos tracks, the HomePod renders spatial audio better than any other smart speaker. The processing happens on-device with the H1 chip, and the result is more convincingly three-dimensional than what Sonos or Echo produce on the same source material.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天排行榜整體維持穩定。Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen 排第一靠的是智慧家庭整合的廣度，Alexa 支援的設備比 Google Assistant 和 Siri 加起來還多，這個生態系優勢隨著你買越多智慧家庭設備會越明顯。Sonos Era 100 穩坐第二，音質純粹度跟多房間同步可靠度都沒有其他智慧喇叭平台能比。這週比較有趣的消息是 Sonos 本身，TechRadar 報導 Sonos 在 2026 年要加大硬體發表力道，預期會有新款耳機和戶外喇叭。這些不影響今天排名，但證明 Era 100 平台還在持續投資。Apple HomePod 2nd Gen 排第三還是 Apple Music Dolby Atmos 聽眾的正確選擇，空間音訊呈現確實比 Sonos 或 Echo 強。Google Home Speaker 2026 排第五，語音助理智能仍是 Google 最強。Echo Dot 排第八，是把 Alexa 帶進房間最便宜的方式。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 2nd Gen 的 Alexa 設備支援優勢會隨時間累積
highlights.body: Alexa 支援的智慧家庭設備比任何其他平台都多，燈、鎖、恆溫器、灑水器、攝影機、車庫門、掃地機器人都有支援。當你的智慧家庭規模擴大，這個相容性優勢會越來越明顯。Google Home 和 Apple HomeKit 在某些設備類別都有缺口，你遲早會遇到。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 仍然是全家音響的正確選擇
highlights.body: 如果你想要在多個房間都有真正同步播放的音樂，Sonos 是唯一能在規模上可靠交付的平台。Era 100 是進入點，提供整條產品線最好的每元音質。TechRadar 的報導顯示 Sonos 在 2026 年會加大硬體投入，這讓投入這個平台變得更安全。

highlights.title: Apple HomePod 2nd Gen 是 Apple Music Dolby Atmos 的正確選擇
highlights.body: 如果你的音樂庫在 Apple Music 而且你會聽 Dolby Atmos 曲目，HomePod 呈現空間音訊的效果比任何其他智慧喇叭都好。處理在裝置上由 H1 晶片完成，結果比 Sonos 或 Echo 用同樣音源產生的更有立體感。

en.commentary: Smart speaker rankings stayed locked in May 2026 because the Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen finally did what Sonos and Apple promised — actual high-fidelity audio in a smart speaker form factor. Dolby Atmos with proper directional drivers and the Alexa+ AI assistant integration that finally feels like a thinking assistant, not a remote control. Sonos Era 100 at #2 is the audio-quality pick that does not lock you to one ecosystem. Apple HomePod 2nd Gen at #3 is the Apple ecosystem pick. Sonos Era 300 at #4 is the spatial audio Sonos. Google Home Speaker (2026) at #5 is the Google ecosystem pick. JBL Authentics 500 at #6 is the design-forward pick. Amazon Echo 4th Gen at #7 is the budget Echo. Echo Dot 5th Gen at #8 is the under-$50 entry. Apple HomePod Mini at #9 is the Apple Mini. Skip every smart speaker without spatial audio in 2026 if you have the budget — directional drivers are the real upgrade.

highlights.title: Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen holds first because it finally delivers audio quality plus a real assistant
highlights.body: Dolby Atmos with directional drivers, Alexa+ AI assistant that handles multi-step requests without losing context, and the price point is half what Sonos charges for comparable hardware. At $229 it is the smart speaker that ended the trade-off between audio quality and assistant capability.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 is the right pick if you want audio without ecosystem lock-in
highlights.body: Works with AirPlay 2, Spotify Connect, Sonos S2 app, and the audio quality matches the Echo Studio. The trade-off is no built-in voice assistant — you pair it with Alexa or Google Home in the Sonos app. At $249 it is for buyers who care about audio more than they care about the assistant.

highlights.title: Apple HomePod 2nd Gen is the Apple ecosystem pick that does not feel like a tax
highlights.body: Siri integration, AirPlay 2, and the spatial audio computational tuning to the room is the best in the category. The price is steep but the audio matches Sonos. At $299 it is the right pick for households where iPhone is the default.

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker (2026) is the new Google entry that catches up
highlights.body: Gemini 3 Pro integration on-device, decent audio (not Sonos-level but better than the previous Nest Audio), and the Google Home ecosystem integration. At $179 it is the right pick for Google households without paying Apple or Sonos prices.

highlights.title: Skip Echo Dot 5th Gen unless you specifically want a sub-$50 speaker
highlights.body: The Echo Dot is fine for a kitchen or bathroom timer and not much else. The audio is mono and weak, the assistant is the same Alexa+ as the Studio but the speaker cannot deliver music. At $49 it is what it is. Buy the Echo 4th Gen at $99 instead if music matters at all.

zh-tw.commentary: 5 月智慧喇叭排行很穩，Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen 終於做到 Sonos 跟 Apple 承諾的事，就是智慧喇叭形式真正的高保真音質。Dolby Atmos 配真正的指向性單體，Alexa+ AI 助理整合終於像會思考的助理而不是遙控器。Sonos Era 100 排第二是不被綁生態系的音質選擇。Apple HomePod 2nd Gen 排第三是 Apple 生態系選擇。Sonos Era 300 排第四是空間音訊 Sonos。Google Home Speaker (2026) 排第五是 Google 生態系選擇。JBL Authentics 500 排第六是設計派選擇。Amazon Echo 4th Gen 排第七是預算 Echo。Echo Dot 5th Gen 排第八是台灣 1,500 元級入門。Apple HomePod Mini 排第九是 Apple Mini。預算夠的話，2026 年沒有空間音訊的智慧喇叭全部跳過，指向性單體才是真升級。

highlights.title: Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen 守住第一是因為終於同時交付音質跟真正助理
highlights.body: Dolby Atmos 配指向性單體、Alexa+ AI 助理處理多步驟請求不會失去脈絡、價格只要 Sonos 同等硬體一半。台灣 7,500 元，是終結「音質跟助理能力二選一」這個取捨的智慧喇叭。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 是要音質又不要生態系綁定的正解
highlights.body: 支援 AirPlay 2、Spotify Connect、Sonos S2 App，音質跟 Echo Studio 打平。代價是沒有內建語音助理，要在 Sonos App 裡配對 Alexa 或 Google Home。台灣 8,200 元給音質比助理重要的買家。

highlights.title: Apple HomePod 2nd Gen 是不會感覺像繳稅的 Apple 生態系選擇
highlights.body: Siri 整合、AirPlay 2、空間音訊根據房間運算調校是這品類最好的。價格高但音質匹配 Sonos。台灣 9,800 元給 iPhone 是預設選擇的家庭正解。

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker (2026) 是 Google 終於追上的新作
highlights.body: Gemini 3 Pro 設備內整合、音質還不錯 (不是 Sonos 等級但比之前的 Nest Audio 好)、Google Home 生態系整合。台灣 5,800 元給 Google 家庭不用付 Apple 或 Sonos 價格的正解。

highlights.title: Echo Dot 5th Gen 除非你特別要 1,500 元級喇叭不然跳過
highlights.body: Echo Dot 在廚房或浴室當計時器還可以，其他都不行。音訊是單聲道又弱、助理是同一套 Alexa+ 但喇叭無法傳遞音樂。台灣 1,500 元就是這樣。要聽音樂就花 3,200 元買 Echo 4th Gen。

en.commentary: The smart speaker space looks frozen on the surface and is actually moving fast underneath, and the Echo Studio 2nd Gen at 9.0 is the proof. Amazon refreshed the hardware with a new 5.25-inch woofer, three 2-inch tweeters, and Dolby Atmos rendering that for a single speaker is genuinely impressive in a 4-meter living room. The Alexa+ generative AI integration with on-device processing finally makes follow-up questions work without the awkward wake-word repetition. At $199 it's the rational center of the smart-speaker conversation. Sonos Era 100 at 8.7 holds because it's still the best multi-room speaker for households that already own Sonos, and the Trueplay tuning on iOS still beats every competitor's room calibration. HomePod 2nd Gen at 8.4 is the Apple-household pick and its computational audio remains the cleanest soundstage in stereo pairing, but Siri's third-party support still trails Alexa. Sonos Era 300 at 8.2 is the spatial-audio specialist and overshoots most rooms. Google Home Speaker at 8.1 is the Pixel-household answer with Gemini integration. For Memorial Day, Echo Studio 2nd Gen is the speaker I'd buy first.

highlights.title: Echo Studio 2nd Gen earned its top score with hardware upgrades
highlights.body: Amazon's redesigned acoustic chamber, the 5.25-inch downfiring woofer, and Dolby Atmos rendering finally deliver smart-speaker audio that holds its own against $400 dedicated speakers. Alexa+ with the new on-device generative model handles two-step commands without re-prompting, and the matter hub built in finally lets it serve as smart-home backbone. At $199, this is the most underrated upgrade of 2026.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 still owns multi-room
highlights.body: If you already own one Sonos product, the Era 100 is the only smart speaker that joins your system without compromise. Trueplay tuning on iOS adapts to room acoustics in 90 seconds and the result is a soundstage that beats Echo Studio in jazz and acoustic content. The catch is Sonos Voice Control still trails Alexa, so this is the audiophile-leaning pick for households that prioritize music over assistant capability. $249 well spent for the right buyer.

highlights.title: HomePod 2nd Gen remains the Apple ecosystem answer
highlights.body: Apple's computational audio creates the cleanest stereo pairing in the category, full stop. Two HomePod 2s in a living room produce a soundstage that genuinely competes with $1,500 hi-fi setups. Siri's smart-home control via Matter finally works reliably in 2026, and HomeKit Secure Video integration is the privacy-first feature Echo doesn't match. At $299, it's the obvious pick if you live in iCloud. Outside of Apple, the value math gets harder.

zh-tw.commentary: 智慧喇叭表面看起來市場凍結了，其實底下動很快，Echo Studio 第二代拿 9.0 就是證明。Amazon 整個換了硬體，新的 5.25 吋低音單體加三顆 2 吋高音，加上 Dolby Atmos 環繞渲染，單顆喇叭在 4 公尺客廳真的有感。Alexa+ 生成式 AI 整合本地端處理，終於讓追問問題不用一直重講喚醒詞。賣 NT$6,200 是智慧喇叭討論的合理中心。Sonos Era 100 拿 8.7 還在前段是因為它還是已經有 Sonos 的家庭最強的多房間喇叭，iOS 上的 Trueplay 空間調音還是贏所有對手的房間校正。HomePod 第二代拿 8.4 是 Apple 家庭專屬，運算音訊在立體聲配對的音場乾淨度還是冠軍，可是 Siri 對第三方支援還是落後 Alexa。Sonos Era 300 拿 8.2 是空間音訊專家，對大部分房間太誇張。Google Home Speaker 拿 8.1 是 Pixel 家庭的 Gemini 答案。我跟你講，紀念日要買第一台 Echo Studio 第二代就對了。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 第二代靠硬體升級贏得最高分
highlights.body: Amazon 重新設計的音腔、5.25 吋下射式低音單體、Dolby Atmos 環繞渲染，終於讓智慧喇叭的音質撐得住跟 NT$12,000 專業喇叭比較。Alexa+ 配上新的本地端生成式模型，能處理兩段式指令不用重複喚醒，內建的 Matter 中樞終於能當智慧家庭骨幹。賣 NT$6,200 是 2026 年最被低估的升級。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 在多房間還是無敵
highlights.body: 如果你家已經有一台 Sonos，Era 100 是唯一能加入你現有系統不妥協的智慧喇叭。Trueplay 空間調音在 iOS 上 90 秒適應房間聲學，結果是在爵士跟原聲內容上音場贏過 Echo Studio。缺點是 Sonos Voice Control 還是落後 Alexa，這就是音樂優先於語音助理的家庭選擇。賣 NT$7,800 對的買家花得值得。

highlights.title: HomePod 第二代還是 Apple 生態系的答案
highlights.body: Apple 的運算音訊創造出這個品類最乾淨的立體聲配對音場，沒有第二句話。客廳放兩台 HomePod 2 產生的音場真的能跟 NT$45,000 的 Hi-Fi 系統競爭。Siri 透過 Matter 控制智慧家庭在 2026 年終於穩定可靠，HomeKit Secure Video 整合是 Echo 比不上的隱私優先功能。賣 NT$9,400，住在 iCloud 裡的人就是顯而易見的選擇。

en.commentary: The Echo Studio 2nd Gen launch pulled smart speaker buying intent into May and the 2026 ranking stays in place because the new Amazon flagship genuinely delivered. The Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen keeps first because the upgraded driver array, the new Alexa AI built on Anthropic Claude integration that finally makes Alexa worth talking to, and the spatial audio implementation deliver flagship-tier music quality at $199. The Sonos Era 100 stays second on the strength of the Sonos ecosystem and the music-first sound profile, but the lack of a polished AI assistant is becoming a meaningful disadvantage in 2026. The Apple HomePod 2nd Gen takes third because Apple's spatial audio implementation remains best-in-class for users in the Apple ecosystem, but Siri's stagnation against Alexa AI and Google Gemini integrations has hurt the broader appeal. The pattern in 2026 is that the integration of next-generation AI assistants has become the defining feature of smart speakers, and the speakers stuck on legacy assistant technology have lost meaningful share. Amazon's Anthropic Claude integration in particular has been the year's most meaningful technology update, finally making Alexa useful for real conversation rather than just commands.

highlights.title: Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen is the smart speaker upgrade everyone should consider
highlights.body: Upgraded driver array delivers genuine flagship music quality, new Alexa AI built on Anthropic Claude finally makes Alexa worth talking to for actual conversation, and the spatial audio implementation rivals HomePod. At $199 it undercuts every comparable flagship by at least $100 while delivering equal or better sound.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 wins for music-first ecosystem buyers
highlights.body: Sonos ecosystem integration remains the best for users who want multi-room audio, music-first sound profile is calibrated for serious listening rather than voice assistant conversation, and the Trueplay tuning genuinely adapts to room acoustics. At $249 it's the right pick for users who prioritize music over assistant capability.

highlights.title: Apple HomePod 2nd Gen is essential for Apple ecosystem users
highlights.body: Spatial audio implementation remains best-in-class for users with Apple TV 4K and AirPlay 2, the integration with HomeKit and Apple Music is the smoothest in any smart speaker, and the design language fits Apple-centric households perfectly. At $299 it's premium, but for Apple users this is still the only honest pick.

zh-tw.commentary: Echo Studio 2nd Gen 上市把智慧喇叭買氣拉到五月，2026 年排行沒變動，Amazon 新旗艦真的兌現。第一名 Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen 守住，升級單體陣列、Alexa AI 採用 Anthropic Claude 整合終於讓 Alexa 值得對話、空間音訊實作完整，NT$6,500 上下交出旗艦級音樂品質。第二名 Sonos Era 100 守得住，Sonos 生態整合跟音樂優先聲音定調，但缺少完整 AI 助理在 2026 年變成有感劣勢。第三名 Apple HomePod 2nd Gen，Apple 生態使用者用空間音訊還是品類最好，但 Siri 跟 Alexa AI、Google Gemini 整合相比停滯，讓整體吸引力下降。2026 年的脈絡是新一代 AI 助理整合變成智慧喇叭的決定性功能，停在舊世代助理技術的喇叭都掉份額。Amazon 跟 Anthropic Claude 整合是今年最有意義的技術更新，終於讓 Alexa 對真正對話有用而不只是執行指令。

highlights.title: Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen 是每個人都該考慮的升級
highlights.body: 升級單體陣列交出真的旗艦音樂品質、Alexa AI 採用 Anthropic Claude 終於讓 Alexa 值得對話、空間音訊實作能跟 HomePod 對打。NT$6,500 上下比同等級旗艦便宜至少 NT$3,000，整體聲音還更好。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 適合音樂優先生態買家
highlights.body: Sonos 生態整合對多房間音訊還是品類最好、音樂優先聲音調定為認真聽音樂校正、Trueplay 校音真的適應空間聲學。NT$8,000 上下對在意音樂勝於助理能力的人是正解。

highlights.title: Apple HomePod 2nd Gen 是 Apple 生態使用者的必備
highlights.body: Apple TV 4K 加 AirPlay 2 用空間音訊還是品類最好、HomeKit 跟 Apple Music 整合是所有智慧喇叭最順的、設計語彙完美融入 Apple 為主家庭。NT$10,000 是高階定價，但 Apple 使用者就只有這台是誠實選擇。

references.title: Best smart speakers 2026: Amazon, Google, Apple tested

en.commentary: Amazon Echo Studio (2nd Gen) keeps first because the spatial audio rendering, the Alexa+ integration that finally makes voice queries useful for shopping and calendar tasks, and the Eero mesh integration are still the spec combination that closes the case for any Amazon-ecosystem buyer. Amazon's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the Echo Studio at $179.99 (regular $199.99), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. Sonos Era 100 at second remains the right answer for buyers who prioritize music quality over voice assistant capability and who have other Sonos devices, and Sonos's app finally feels stable after the 2024 disaster. Apple HomePod (2nd Gen) at third is the Apple-ecosystem pick that genuinely sounds the best in solo configuration. Google Nest Audio at fourth is the dark horse value play after the May 6 firmware update added Gemini integration that closes the AI-assistant gap to Alexa+. The 5/8 read is that the smart speaker market is stable, Echo Studio's Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and Google's Gemini firmware update is genuinely the most consequential category news of the week.

highlights.title: Amazon Echo Studio at $179.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Amazon's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. Spatial audio plus Alexa+ integration plus Eero mesh at $180 closes the value argument decisively for any Amazon-ecosystem buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 sounds the best of any standalone smart speaker for music
highlights.body: For buyers who prioritize music quality over voice assistant features and who have other Sonos products, the Era 100 stereo pair configuration produces sound that no other smart speaker matches. Sonos's app stability is now genuinely fixed after the 2024 saga.

highlights.title: Google Nest Audio May 6 Gemini firmware closes the AI assistant gap
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update on Nest Audio replaced the legacy Google Assistant with full Gemini integration, which finally closes the conversational-AI gap to Alexa+. For Google-ecosystem buyers this is now a credible smart speaker recommendation, which it was not a quarter ago.

zh-tw.commentary:
Amazon Echo Studio (2nd Gen) 第一名守住，空間音訊渲染、Alexa+ 整合在語音購物跟行事曆查詢終於變實用、Eero mesh 整合，這個規格組合對 Amazon 生態圈買家還是首選。Amazon Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Echo Studio 殺到 $179.99（原 $199.99），是上市以來最低。

en.commentary: The Echo Studio 2nd Gen keeps my top pick after another week of solid reviews. Tom's Guide called out clean, balanced audio across genres at a price that makes the original Echo Studio look quaint, and the Alexa+ integration is finally where I expected it to be when the launch was announced. The Sonos Era 100 stays my number two for one specific reason: it sounds better than anything else in this price bracket and the multiroom story is still unmatched. The HomePod 2nd Gen holds third because Apple's spatial audio handling and the new Siri behaviors that rolled out in iOS keep it relevant despite the closed ecosystem. The Era 300 remains the spatial-audio specialist for households that already live inside Sonos. Google's 2026 Home speaker is the budget pick I keep recommending to friends in Google Home households because Gemini has finally caught Alexa+ on contextual queries. JBL Authentics 500 is the design splurge for people who want the speaker to be the room's centerpiece. Below that, the Echo 4th Gen and Echo Dot 5th Gen are the honest entry points, and the HomePod mini still earns its place as the cheapest way into a fully Apple-controlled smart home. Buy the Echo Studio 2 if you want flagship Alexa, the Era 100 if you want the best sound, the Google Home for a Google-centric home.

en.commentary: Smart speakers were one of the bigger Mother's-Day gift categories and the post-weekend inventory tells the story. Amazon Echo Studio 2nd gen sold through at every major retailer, which is why it stays at first; Amazon's Alexa+ rollout this spring is actually improving the daily experience in a way Apple and Google have not matched. Sonos Era 100 at second is still the right answer if you care about music more than home automation. The new Trueplay tuning that landed in May app version 80.1 genuinely improved bass response in smaller rooms. Apple HomePod 2nd gen at third gets dragged down by Siri, and I'll keep dragging it down as long as Siri keeps failing at basic queries. The hardware deserves better than this software. Sonos Era 300 at fourth is for spatial audio fans only; if you don't subscribe to Apple Music's spatial library or Amazon Music HD you are paying for features you can't use. Google Home Speaker 2026 at fifth deserves more credit than reviewers have given it. Gemini integration is the most useful AI assistant story in this category right now. JBL Authentics 500 at sixth is the design pick. If aesthetics matter to your living room more than software, the Authentics still wins on looks.

highlights.title: Amazon Echo Studio 2nd gen is the right top pick for 2026
highlights.body: Alexa+ is actually making this product better month-over-month. Sound quality at the price is competitive. Sold out everywhere this weekend for a reason.

highlights.body: May firmware improved Trueplay bass response in small rooms. If you care about music quality first and smart features second this is the call.

highlights.body: Hardware is excellent. Siri keeps failing at basic queries in 2026, which is embarrassing for a product this expensive. I will not stop saying this.

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker 2026 has the best AI story in category
highlights.body: Gemini integration is genuinely useful for natural conversation. Reviewers keep sleeping on this because Google's hardware launches have been muted.

highlights.body: If the speaker has to look right in your space and software is a secondary concern, JBL is still the play. The vintage Marshall-adjacent look has staying power.

zh-tw.commentary: 智慧音箱是母親節大宗禮物，週末過後通路庫存的狀況其實滿能說明問題。Amazon Echo Studio 2nd gen 在美國各大通路全部完售，所以我繼續放第一，Alexa+ 春季更新後日常體驗真的有提升，Apple 跟 Google 都還沒追上來。Sonos Era 100 第二，重音樂的人選它沒錯，5 月版 80.1 App 更新後 Trueplay 在小房間的低頻表現有感提升，我自己重聽幾首搖滾真的差很多。Apple HomePod 2 第三，硬體被 Siri 拖垮，我就是要繼續講這件事，2026 年了 Siri 還搞不定基本查詢，這個價格的產品這軟體真的丟臉。Sonos Era 300 第四只適合空間音訊的鐵粉，沒訂 Apple Music 空間音訊或 Amazon Music HD 的話，這支等於白花錢。Google Home Speaker 2026 第五，講真的評測界給它的評價太低，Gemini 整合是這個品類目前 AI 助手最有用的，被 Google 硬體部門低調收尾連累了。JBL Authentics 500 第六是外型派的選擇，客廳擺好看比軟體強更重要的人選它，那個復古 Marshall 風格真的有持久魅力。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 2nd gen 2026 第一名是有道理的
highlights.body: Alexa+ 一個月一個月在進步，這個價位音質也撐得住。其實上週末全美通路全部完售，市場已經用錢投票了。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 是音樂優先派的標準答案
highlights.body: 5 月韌體把小房間 Trueplay 低頻修得有感。重音質的人選它，智慧家庭功能放第二順位的選擇真的清楚。

highlights.body: Gemini 對話流暢度是這個品類目前最好的。其實是 Google 硬體部門宣傳太低調，連帶評測界都低估它了。

en.commentary: Three days of holiday cookouts is the perfect smart speaker stress test, and after running every pick through a weekend of guests, kid playlists, and outdoor patio music, the Sonos Era 100 keeps coming out as the most pleasant compact speaker in the room. It sounds bigger than its footprint, plays nicely with Alexa, AirPlay 2, and Sonos Voice Control, and the new TruePlay auto tuning on iOS and Android finally lands the bass on hardwood floors. If you live deep in the Apple world, the HomePod 2nd Gen is still the easiest answer, with Spatial Audio that genuinely fills a living room and HomeKit hub duty that quietly runs my whole house. Amazon's Echo Studio 2nd Gen is the surprise winner for smart home die hards because Alexa+ now handles multi step requests in one breath and the built in Zigbee and Matter hub kills a separate bridge purchase. The Sonos Era 300 stays on top for immersive Atmos in a single box, and Google Nest Audio remains the rare bargain pick under $100 with the Memorial Day price drop. Today is the final Monday before pricing resets on Tuesday, so if your kitchen still leans on a Bluetooth speaker from 2019, this is the cleanest weekend of the year to upgrade and have it shipped by Wednesday.

en.commentary: Friday morning four days post-Memorial Day and the smart speaker board reset on schedule. Sonos Era 100 bounced from $199 holiday pricing back to $249, HomePod 2nd Gen holds at $299, and Echo Studio 2nd Gen sits at $199 from the $159 floor. The Memorial Day window was the best spring discount and the next promotional opening is Father's Day on June 21, which has become a serious smart speaker gift window because the category fits both the gift-card budget tier and the actual lifestyle of a kitchen-dwelling dad. My Friday read is this: if you missed Memorial Day on the Era 100, do not pay $249 today. Sonos historically promotes Era units for Father's Day with a $30 to $50 trim, which puts the Era 100 back near $199 within three weeks. HomePod 2nd Gen at $299 is the rare Apple speaker that occasionally trims for Father's Day to $279, but Apple is not aggressive in this category so the wait is marginal. Echo Studio 2nd Gen at $199 is the smart home flex and Amazon historically discounts Echo units heavily around Father's Day, so $159 again is a credible target especially with Alexa Plus now ninety days into general availability and Amazon pushing adoption hard. For Apple households the HomePod 2nd Gen pair at $599 still owns the living room. Friday evening planning beats Tuesday morning impulse-buying and the gift-buying dad in your circle will appreciate the upgrade from a 2019 Bluetooth puck.

This is the gift you commit to today without the waiting game.

Expect $159 again with a credible shot at $149 if Amazon runs an early Prime Day. The built-in Zigbee and Matter hub kills a separate bridge purchase, which makes this the right gift for a smart-home-curious dad.

en.commentary:
Sunday May 31, Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen holds the top position in smart speakers and the reasoning is durable. The Echo Studio 2nd Gen pairs a genuinely room-filling audio output with Alexa's best-in-class smart home integration. Alexa controls more compatible devices than any competing voice assistant, and the Echo Studio's five-driver array with Dolby Atmos support creates a three-dimensional listening experience that single-driver competitors simply cannot match. At $199 it is the most audio-capable smart speaker in the Amazon lineup and the smart home command center for households invested in Amazon's ecosystem.

Sonos Era 100 holds second at $249. For buyers who prioritize audio quality above all else, the Sonos Era 100 is the recommendation I give without hesitation. The Era 100's sound output competes with speakers costing twice as much, and Sonos' multi-room synchronization across the Sonos ecosystem is the most reliable and lowest-latency implementation available today. Trueplay room calibration is automatic and genuinely improves bass and soundstage in every room I have tested it in.

Apple HomePod 2nd Gen holds third at $299. For Apple households, the HomePod 2nd Gen is the right recommendation. The computational audio engine delivers room-adaptive sound processing that is technically sophisticated, and Siri's integration with Apple HomeKit makes it the best smart home speaker for Apple ecosystem users. The limitation is Siri's narrower third-party app integration compared to Alexa.

Sonos Era 300 holds fourth at $449 for buyers who want spatial audio with Dolby Atmos. Google Home Speaker 2026 holds fifth. The smart speaker category is stable with no major new releases expected before Father's Day.

en.commentary: My list holds steady this week, and the 2026 round of expert testing supports the shape of it. The Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen stays my number one because it pairs genuinely room-filling sound with the broadest smart-home brain in the category, handling Zigbee and Matter so it can act as the hub a real connected home needs. For most people building out smart lighting and sensors, this is the speaker that does the most jobs well. The Sonos Era 100 holds second on pure audio craft. Reviewers keep calling out how it delivers spectacular sound from a very small footprint, and a stereo pair gives you outstanding separation for far less than premium alternatives, which is the value play I point music-first buyers toward. Apple's HomePod 2nd Gen stays at three, and its standout trick is still real-time room scanning that optimizes audio for wherever you place it, plus it now works as a stronger hub across both HomeKit and Matter. If you live in Apple's world, it is the obvious pick. The Sonos Era 300 sits at four for spatial audio, wrapping a room from a single cabinet using two woofers and four tweeters. Down the list, the Amazon Echo lineup keeps owning value and voice. The 4th Gen remains the all-rounder I recommend most, and the Echo Dot Max brings snappy Alexa and full smart-home control in a compact, affordable shell for anyone starting out.

en.commentary:
The Amazon Echo Studio (2nd Gen) holds rank 1, and it earns it by being the most complete smart speaker for a connected home. The Apple HomePod (2nd Gen) at rank 3 remains the obvious pick for Apple households. It pairs a 9.0 sound-quality score with deep Siri and HomeKit integration, and for anyone whose home already runs on Apple devices, the handoff and ecosystem fit are worth a lot. en.commentary: The Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen stays at the top because it does the two jobs a smart speaker actually has to do, and it does both at once. Alexa answers fast, the new on-device model handles follow-up questions without a beat, and the room-correction tuning fills a medium living room with warm, even sound. At its price that combination is hard to beat. I keep one in my kitchen and it has become the default way I run timers, lights and music in that part of the house. The Sonos Era 100 holds second on pure musicality. If you care more about how a record sounds than how clever the assistant is, this is the one I point people toward, and the stereo-pair option makes it scale beautifully. The Apple HomePod 2nd Gen sits third and remains the obvious pick for an Apple household, with tight bass and clean Siri handoff between devices. Further down, the Echo Dot Max continues to punch above its size for anyone who wants real Alexa smarts on a nightstand budget. Coverage this week reinforced the same shape of the market: reviewers still rank the Echo line for value and whole-home control, Sonos for sound, and the JBL Authentics for running two assistants at once. Nothing launched that moves the needle, so I am holding every rank steady. When you are buying into a smart speaker you are really buying into an ecosystem, so pick the assistant you already live with and let sound quality break the tie.

en.commentary: Prime Day landing on June 23 reshuffles the value math more than the sound math this week, and that is exactly why I am nudging the Echo Studio's value score up rather than its rank. When Amazon's own flagship drops to genuine discount territory during its own sale event, the Studio becomes the easiest recommendation I can make for a single do-everything speaker. It still carries the deepest smart-home reach, the sharpest Alexa responses, and Dolby Atmos that fills a real living room. The Sonos Era 100 stays my pick for anyone who cares about music first. It simply sounds richer and cleaner than anything Amazon ships, and the build feels like a premium object on the shelf. The HomePod 2nd gen holds third because Apple's room-correction trick still produces sound that punches above the cabinet size, and HomeKit users get a tightly woven experience. Lower down, the Echo Dot Max keeps earning its spot as the smartest small speaker for the money, and during Prime Day it is the impulse buy I would green-light without hesitation. My overall read this week: the rankings are stable, but the buying window is not. If you have wanted a capable smart speaker, the next few days are the best value moment of the year, and the Echo Studio is the one I would put in a cart first.

highlights.title: Echo Dot Max 性價比加分
highlights.body: 評測選它為 2026 最佳平價喇叭，低音更好、晶片更快、還為 Alexa+ 做好準備。這個升級組合這一輪值得小加一分性價比。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 是音質優先款
highlights.body: 它還是榜上最好聽的小型喇叭。把音樂品質擺第一的聽眾，我就是把他們指向這台。

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker 是要盯的發表
highlights.body: 評測說如果 Google 兌現承諾的硬體復興，那會是 2026 最重要的一場智慧喇叭發表。上市時很可能重洗這張榜的中段。

en.commentary: The Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen holds my top spot because it does the whole job better than anything at its price. Alexa stays the fastest, most capable assistant for actually running a home, the Zigbee and Matter hub means fewer bridges cluttering your shelf, and the room-filling sound finally matches the smarts. For pure audio I still send people to the Sonos Era 100, and this month's testing at What Hi-Fi backs that instinct. It puts out the widest, cleanest sound in this bracket and looks the part on an open shelf, so it stays my number two for anyone who cares about music first and voice second. The Apple HomePod 2nd Gen remains the effortless choice inside an Apple household, where handoff and HomeKit make it feel invisible in the best way. What struck me in this month's roundups is how settled the order has become: the same names keep trading the same positions, which tells me the category is mature rather than stalled. The Echo Dot Max earns its mid-table spot as the small speaker that punches above its footprint, and the classic Echo Dot 5th Gen is still the cheapest sensible way to add Alexa to a spare room. No launch this week moved the needle, so I am carrying every rank forward with confidence.

highlights.title: Echo Studio 2nd Gen leads on balance
highlights.body: Fast, capable Alexa, a built-in Zigbee and Matter hub, and sound that finally matches the smarts make it the speaker I recommend to most homes at its price.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 for music first
highlights.body: This month's What Hi-Fi testing confirms it puts out the widest, cleanest sound in the bracket, so it stays my pick when audio quality leads and voice follows.

highlights.title: HomePod 2nd Gen for Apple homes
highlights.body: Handoff and HomeKit make it feel invisible in the best way inside an Apple household, which is exactly why it holds its place.

highlights.title: A settled, mature category
highlights.body: The same names keep trading the same positions across this month's roundups, which reads to me as maturity rather than stagnation.

highlights.title: Small and cheap picks still shine
highlights.body: The Echo Dot Max punches above its footprint, and the Echo Dot 5th Gen remains the cheapest sensible way to add Alexa to a spare room.

zh-tw.commentary: Amazon Echo Studio 2 代守住我的第一名，因為同價位裡它整體最全面。Alexa 還是拿來真的管家裡最快、最能幹的語音助理，內建 Zigbee 跟 Matter 中樞，你桌上就少了一堆橋接器，而且這代的音量跟音質總算配得上它的聰明。純聽音樂我還是叫人去買 Sonos Era 100，這個月 What Hi-Fi 的測試也印證我的直覺，它在這個級距放出來的聲音最寬、最乾淨，擺在開放層架上也好看，所以想先顧音樂、語音其次的人，它守住我的第二。Apple HomePod 2 代在蘋果家庭裡還是那個最無腦順的選擇，接力播放跟 HomeKit 讓它用起來幾乎無感，這是好的無感。這個月幾家榜單讓我很有感的是排名已經很穩了，同幾個名字一直在同幾個位置換來換去，這代表市場成熟，不是停滯。Echo Dot Max 靠小體積放出超值的聲音守住中段，經典的 Echo Dot 5 代還是幫客房加個 Alexa 最省的合理選擇。這禮拜沒有新品能撼動什麼，所以每個名次我都很有把握地延用。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 2 代靠均衡稱王
highlights.body: Alexa 快又能幹，內建 Zigbee 跟 Matter 中樞，音質這代總算跟得上它的聰明，同價位我對大多數家庭都推它。

highlights.title: 先顧音樂就選 Sonos Era 100
highlights.body: 這個月 What Hi-Fi 測試印證它在這級距聲音最寬最乾淨，想把音質擺第一、語音其次的人，它守住我的第二。

highlights.title: 蘋果家庭選 HomePod 2 代
highlights.body: 接力播放加 HomeKit 讓它在蘋果生態裡用起來幾乎無感，這正是它守住位置的原因。

highlights.title: 成熟又穩定的市場
highlights.body: 這個月幾家榜單同幾個名字一直在同幾個位置互換，我讀到的是成熟，不是停滯。

highlights.title: 小台跟平價款照樣亮眼
highlights.body: Echo Dot Max 靠小體積放出超值的聲音，Echo Dot 5 代還是幫客房加個 Alexa 最省的合理選擇。

en.commentary: The Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen keeps the top spot this week because it blends genuinely full sound with the deepest smart-home reach of anything here. If you already run Alexa devices, it becomes the hub the rest of your house leans on. The Sonos Era 100 stays a close second, and for pure listening it is the one I reach for first. Its clarity and bass extension under three hundred dollars remain the benchmark, and the multi-room flexibility is unmatched. Apple's HomePod 2nd Gen holds third as the obvious answer for iPhone homes that want room-filling audio and tight HomeKit control. The Sonos Era 300 sits just behind for spatial-audio fans who want height and width from a single unit. The interesting story is the Google Home Speaker, which represents Google's return to serious speaker hardware after a long gap. It is climbing on the strength of its assistant and smart-home smarts, and I expect it to keep pressure on the Echo line. Nothing shipped this week that reorders my board, so I held ranks. Buy the Echo Studio if Alexa runs your home, buy the Era 100 if sound quality leads your list, and buy the HomePod 2 if you live on Apple. Each one earns its spot for a specific buyer, and that clarity is what makes this a genuinely easy category to shop right now.

highlights.title: Echo Studio anchors the home
highlights.body: Full sound plus the widest smart-home reach make the 2nd Gen the natural hub for an Alexa household.

highlights.title: Era 100 for pure listening
highlights.body: Sonos still sets the sub-300-dollar benchmark for clarity and bass, with multi-room flexibility nobody matches.

highlights.title: HomePod 2 for Apple homes
highlights.body: Room-filling audio and tight HomeKit control make it the clean pick if your house runs on iPhones.

highlights.title: Google is back in the game
highlights.body: The Google Home Speaker marks a real hardware return and keeps steady pressure on the Echo lineup.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Amazon Echo Studio 二代還是第一，因為它把飽滿的音質跟這裡最廣的智慧家庭整合綁在一起。家裡已經一堆 Alexa 裝置的人，它就是整個家會靠著它運作的中樞。Sonos Era 100 緊咬第二，單純想好好聽音樂，我第一個伸手拿的就是它。NT$8,000 上下這個價位帶，它的清晰度跟低頻延伸還是標竿，多房串連更是沒人比得上。Apple HomePod 二代排第三，iPhone 家庭想要充滿整個房間的聲音、又要 HomeKit 控制順，選它最直覺。Sonos Era 300 排在後面一點，適合想用一台就吃到高度跟寬度空間音效的人。這波比較有看頭的是 Google Home Speaker，代表 Google 隔了好一陣子重新認真做喇叭，靠著語音助理跟智慧家庭的聰明度往上爬，我看它會持續給 Echo 施壓。這週沒有新機打亂盤面，排名我維持。家裡跑 Alexa 就買 Echo Studio，音質擺第一就買 Era 100，活在蘋果就買 HomePod 二代。每一台都對到一種買家，這種清楚好選，正是現在逛這個類別最舒服的地方。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 撐起全家
highlights.body: 飽滿音質加上最廣的智慧家庭整合，二代自然成為 Alexa 家庭的中樞。

highlights.title: Era 100 純聽最對味
highlights.body: Sonos 在 NT$8,000 上下的清晰度跟低頻仍是標竿，多房串連無人能敵。

highlights.title: HomePod 二代給蘋果家
highlights.body: 充滿房間的聲音加上順手的 HomeKit 控制，iPhone 家庭選它最乾淨。

highlights.title: Google 重返戰場
highlights.body: Google Home Speaker 是一次真正的硬體回歸，對 Echo 陣線持續施壓。
